mapper.sql: SELECT pool.stock_code AS stock_code, COALESCE(pool.stock_name, base.stock_name) AS stock_name, COALESCE(pool.market_code, base.market_code) AS market_code, pool.signal_name AS signal_name, pool.org_num AS org_num FROM t_stock_pool_60 pool LEFT JOIN t_stock_pool base ON base.code = pool.stock_code
mapper.select: WHERE pool.signal_name = #{signalName} AND pool.stock_code IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(pool.stock_code) <> '' ORDER BY pool.stock_code, pool.signal_name
